# templatesForIntegration

Returns all templates that are associated with the integration type.

## Signature

- Root: `Queries`
- Return Type: [[`Template`](../objects/template-object.md)!]!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `integrationType` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The type of integration for which to return associated templates. |
